methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $19M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 19 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Aeon Industrial is a seed-stage Defense & Security company founded by Naweed Tahmas and Joe Cieslik that has raised $18.6M to date. The valuation universe comprises 10 private peers (including Anduril Industries, Helsing, Shield AI, Saronic, and Quantum-Systems) and 2 public comparables (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) across the Defense & Security sector. However, a narrow peer-median approach proved inapplicable due to insufficient same-stage and adjacent-stage datapoints within the immediate peer set.

The analysis relies on stage-progression methodology, which applies a 2.5x step-up multiplier typical of Seed to next-stage transitions. Using the $18.6M total capital raised as a proxy for implied post-money value, this method yields a $46.5M valuation. A sensitivity analysis around this point estimate—applying ±15% variance bands—produces a low-end anchor of $39.5M and high-end anchor of $53.5M, reflecting reasonable bounds on execution risk and market adoption timing.

The triangulated valuation range is $40M–$53M, with a median of $46M. Key uncertainties include the absence of sufficient narrow-stage comparables for cross-validation, making reliance on a single methodological pillar a material limitation. Further refinement would benefit from additional seed-stage transactions in Defense & Security or disclosed follow-on round terms for existing peers.
